name: atm.bootstrap-runtime-map
capability: Bootstrap runtime: next, welcome, doctor, bootstrap commands

name: atm.atom-registry-lifecycle-map
capability: Registry load/save, hash lock, catalog, provenance

name: atm.atom-birth-map
capability: Atom generation, ID allocation, spec scaffold

name: atm.guard-validation-map
capability: Guard validation, test facade, encoding/mutation checks

name: atm.behavior-pack-map
capability: Split, merge, compose, evolve, infect behaviors

name: atm.integration-pack-map
capability: Editor integrations (Codex, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini)

name: atm.release-build-map
capability: Root-drop, onefile, package dist, version checks
